title: Staged File Envelope V1
description: Schema for a staged file envelope written by the StagingService. Each envelope captures the payload, template, actor, and approval state.

staged_id.description: Unique identifier for this staged file (UUID v4).

actor_id.description: Pseudonymous ID of the actor who staged the file.

actor_role.description: RBAC role of the staging actor.

payload.description: The validated file payload to be written on approval.

staged_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the file was staged.

approver_id.description: Pseudonymous ID of the approver/rejecter, or null if still pending.

resolved_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the file was approved or rejected.

final_path.description: Absolute path where the file was written (populated on approval).

ctl_record_id.description: ID of the most recent CTL commitment record for this staged file.
